languages.text: "Я ценю ваше беспокойство, Вольный Торговец, но эксперимент полностью под контролем. К тому же, Нунциус тщательно наблюдает за моим состоянием. Прошу простить, я смогу продолжить беседу через минуту".

"I appreciate your concern, Rogue Trader, but the experiment is completely under control. Moreover, Nuncius is carefully monitoring my condition. If you will excuse me, I will be able to continue our conversation in just a moment."
languages.original_text: "Я ценю ваше беспокойство, Вольный Торговец, но эксперимент полностью под контролем. К тому же, Нунциус тщательно наблюдает за моим состоянием. Прошу простить, я смогу продолжить беседу через минуту".

traits.locale_text: "I appreciate your concern, Rogue Trader, but the experiment is completely under control. Moreover, Nuncius is carefully monitoring my condition. If you will excuse me, I will be able to continue our conversation in just a moment."

"I appreciate your concern, Rogue Trader, but the experiment is completely under control. Moreover, Nuncius is carefully monitoring my condition. If you will excuse me, I will be able to continue our conversation in just a moment."

"I appreciate your concern, Rogue Trader, but the experiment is completely under control. Moreover, Nuncius is carefully monitoring my condition. If you will excuse me, I will be able to continue our conversation in just a moment."

languages.text: “感谢您的关心，行商浪人，但实验完全在掌控之中。此外，努恩修斯正严密监测我的体征。请您稍候片刻，我马上就能继续与您的谈话。”
languages.original_text: "I appreciate your concern, Rogue Trader, but the experiment is completely under control. Moreover, Nuncius is carefully monitoring my condition. If you will excuse me, I will be able to continue our conversation in just a moment."

traits.locale_text: “感谢您的关心，行商浪人，但实验完全在掌控之中。此外，努恩修斯正严密监测我的体征。请您稍候片刻，我马上就能继续与您的谈话。”

languages.text: « Votre inquiétude me touche, mais je maîtrise parfaitement cette expérience. Sans compter que Nuncius surveille étroitement mon état. Si vous voulez bien m'excuser, je serai en mesure de poursuivre notre conversation sous peu. »
languages.original_text: "I appreciate your concern, Rogue Trader, but the experiment is completely under control. Moreover, Nuncius is carefully monitoring my condition. If you will excuse me, I will be able to continue our conversation in just a moment."

traits.locale_text: « Votre inquiétude me touche, mais je maîtrise parfaitement cette expérience. Sans compter que Nuncius surveille étroitement mon état. Si vous voulez bien m'excuser, je serai en mesure de poursuivre notre conversation sous peu. »

languages.text: «Agradezco su preocupación, Comerciante Independiente, pero el experimento está completamente controlado. Además, Nuncius vigila atentamente mi estado. Si me disculpa, podré continuar esta conversación en un momento».
languages.original_text: "I appreciate your concern, Rogue Trader, but the experiment is completely under control. Moreover, Nuncius is carefully monitoring my condition. If you will excuse me, I will be able to continue our conversation in just a moment."

traits.locale_text: «Agradezco su preocupación, Comerciante Independiente, pero el experimento está completamente controlado. Además, Nuncius vigila atentamente mi estado. Si me disculpa, podré continuar esta conversación en un momento».

languages.text: "İlginiz için minnettarım Hür Tacir ancak deney tamamen kontrol altında. Dahası, Nuncius durumumu dikkatle izliyor. İzninizle sohbetimize birazdan devam edebileceğim."
languages.original_text: "I appreciate your concern, Rogue Trader, but the experiment is completely under control. Moreover, Nuncius is carefully monitoring my condition. If you will excuse me, I will be able to continue our conversation in just a moment."

traits.locale_text: "İlginiz için minnettarım Hür Tacir ancak deney tamamen kontrol altında. Dahası, Nuncius durumumu dikkatle izliyor. İzninizle sohbetimize birazdan devam edebileceğim."

languages.text: "Ich weiß Eure Bedenken zu schätzen, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, aber das Experiment ist vollständig unter Kontrolle. Überdies überwacht Nuncius unentwegt meinen Zustand. Wenn Ihr mich nun entschuldigt, ich kann unsere Unterhaltung in Kürze fortsetzen."
languages.original_text: "I appreciate your concern, Rogue Trader, but the experiment is completely under control. Moreover, Nuncius is carefully monitoring my condition. If you will excuse me, I will be able to continue our conversation in just a moment."

traits.locale_text: "Ich weiß Eure Bedenken zu schätzen, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, aber das Experiment ist vollständig unter Kontrolle. Überdies überwacht Nuncius unentwegt meinen Zustand. Wenn Ihr mich nun entschuldigt, ich kann unsere Unterhaltung in Kürze fortsetzen."

languages.text: 「ご懸念には感謝します、ローグトレーダー。ですが、実験は完全に制御下にあります。それに、ヌンキウスが私の状態を入念に監視しています。失礼して、ほんの少々で、我々の会話を再開できるようになります」
languages.original_text: "I appreciate your concern, Rogue Trader, but the experiment is completely under control. Moreover, Nuncius is carefully monitoring my condition. If you will excuse me, I will be able to continue our conversation in just a moment."

traits.locale_text: 「ご懸念には感謝します、ローグトレーダー。ですが、実験は完全に制御下にあります。それに、ヌンキウスが私の状態を入念に監視しています。失礼して、ほんの少々で、我々の会話を再開できるようになります」
